name: Ion Drive
description: Charged particle acceleration with energetic thrust

prompts.SessionStart: resonant filtered sweep synth ascending with bright filter opening, ion drive tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: filtered sweep synth descending with smooth resonant closing, ion drive tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single resonant filter sweep landing with satisfying bright ring, ion drive chime, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct filter click with brief resonant snap, ion drive tick, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short filtered sweep chirp confirming with bright resonant ping, ion drive tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two resonant filter tones with questioning ascending sweep, ion drive sound, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady resonant filter hum with clear rhythmic sweep pulse, ion drive tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: filtered sweep splitting into two diverging resonant tones, ion drive sound, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear resonant filter ping returning with bright sweep ring, ion drive tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright resonant filter sweep burst with energetic ascending attack, ion drive tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
